export default function PrivacyPolicy() { return ( <> {```html

Privacy Policy

Website: SHIVAMGRAPH

URL: https://article.shivamgraph.in

Tagline: जागो। समझो। काबिल बनो।

Last Updated: July 2026

Introduction

Welcome to SHIVAMGRAPH (“we”, “our”, or “us”), accessible at https://article.shivamgraph.in. Your privacy is critically important to us. This Privacy Policy document explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have regarding your data when you visit or interact with our Hindi educational platform focused on psychology, neuroscience, discipline, philosophy, productivity, digital awareness, self-improvement, and human development.

By accessing or using SHIVAMGRAPH, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with the terms of this policy, please discontinue use of the website.

1. Information We Collect

We may collect the following types of information when you visit SHIVAMGRAPH:

a. Personal Information

  • Name (when you contact us or subscribe to our newsletter)
  • Email address (for newsletter, communication, or contact form)
  • Any additional information you voluntarily provide via messages or forms

b. Non-Personal Information

  • Browser type and version
  • Operating system
  • Device type and screen resolution
  • IP address (anonymized where possible)
  • Referring URLs and pages visited
  • Date, time, and duration of your visit
  • Approximate geographic location (country/region level)

2. How We Use Information

The information collected is used for the following purposes:

  • To operate, maintain, and improve the SHIVAMGRAPH website
  • To deliver educational content, newsletters, and updates
  • To respond to inquiries submitted through our contact form
  • To analyze user behavior and improve content quality
  • To display personalized or non-personalized advertising
  • To detect, prevent, and address technical or security issues
  • To comply with legal obligations and enforce our Terms of Service

3. Cookies Policy

SHIVAMGRAPH uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance user experience, analyze website performance, and serve relevant advertisements. Cookies are small text files stored on your device.

Types of cookies we use:

  • Essential Cookies: Required for website functionality.
  • Analytics Cookies: Help us understand visitor behavior (e.g., Google Analytics).
  • Advertising Cookies: Used by Google AdSense and partners for personalized ads.
  • Performance Cookies: Used by Cloudflare and similar services for speed and security.

You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings. However, disabling certain cookies may affect the website’s functionality.

4. Google AdSense

SHIVAMGRAPH uses Google AdSense, a third-party advertising service provided by Google LLC, to display advertisements. Google may use cookies (including the DoubleClick DART cookie) to serve ads based on your prior visits to our website and other websites on the Internet.

  • Google’s use of advertising cookies enables it and its partners to serve ads based on your visits.
  • You may opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google Ads Settings.
  • You can also opt out of third-party vendor cookies at www.aboutads.info.

Read Google’s full privacy policy here: https://policies.google.com/technologies/ads.

5. Google Analytics

We use Google Analytics to track and analyze website traffic. Google Analytics collects information such as how often users visit the site, what pages they view, and what other sites they used prior to arriving.

The information collected is used to improve our website and services. Google Analytics collects only the IP address assigned to you on the date you visit the site, rather than your name or other personally identifying information.

You may opt out of Google Analytics tracking by installing the Google Analytics Opt-Out Browser Add-on.

6. Cloudflare

SHIVAMGRAPH uses Cloudflare as a Content Delivery Network (CDN) and security service provider. Cloudflare helps improve website performance and protects against malicious activities such as DDoS attacks.

Cloudflare may collect certain technical information such as your IP address, browser details, and connection metadata to provide these services. For more information, please review Cloudflare’s Privacy Policy at https://www.cloudflare.com/privacypolicy/.

7. Third-Party Services

We may use third-party companies and services to facilitate our website, provide services on our behalf, perform website-related analytics, or assist us in analyzing how our website is used. These third parties may include:

  • Google AdSense and Google Analytics
  • Cloudflare CDN and Security
  • Email newsletter service providers
  • Social media platforms (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, X, LinkedIn, etc.)
  • Affiliate networks (in the future)
  • Digital product delivery platforms (in the future)

These third parties have access to your information only to perform specific tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.

8. Newsletter & Email Collection

When you subscribe to the SHIVAMGRAPH newsletter, we collect your email address (and optionally your name) to send you educational content, updates, articles, and occasional promotional material.

  • We never sell, rent, or share your email address with third parties.
  • You can unsubscribe at any time by clicking the “Unsubscribe” link in any email.
  • Your email is stored securely with our authorized email service provider.

9. User Rights

Depending on your location, you may have the following rights regarding your personal information under applicable data protection laws (such as GDPR, CCPA, and India’s DPDP Act):

  • Right to Access: Request a copy of the personal data we hold.
  • Right to Rectification: Request correction of inaccurate data.
  • Right to Erasure: Request deletion of your personal data.
  • Right to Restrict Processing: Ask us to limit how we use your data.
  • Right to Object: Object to processing for direct marketing or analytics.
  • Right to Data Portability: Request your data in a portable format.
  • Right to Withdraw Consent: Withdraw consent at any time.

To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at shivamchauhangurjar@gmail.com.

10. Data Security

We implement reasonable administrative, technical, and physical security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction. This includes SSL encryption, secure servers, and access controls.

However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to protect your information, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.

11. Children’s Privacy

SHIVAMGRAPH is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately so we can remove such information from our records.

12. External Links

Our website may contain links to external websites, including affiliate links (in the future), which are not operated by us. If you click on a third-party link, you will be directed to that party’s site.

We strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of every site you visit. We have no control over and assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party sites or services.

13. Changes to this Privacy Policy

We reserve the right to update or modify this Privacy Policy at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page along with an updated “Last Updated” date. Significant changes may also be communicated via email or a website notice.

You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically to stay informed about how we protect your information. Continued use of the website after modifications constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

14. Contact Information

If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or your personal data, please contact us:

Website: SHIVAMGRAPH

Email: shivamchauhangurjar@gmail.com

By using SHIVAMGRAPH, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to this Privacy Policy.

```} ); }
